name: overseerr-mcp
description: Overseerr media request management via MCP tools. Search movies and TV shows, submit requests, and monitor failed requests.

settings.name: Overseerr URL
settings.description: URL of your Overseerr instance (e.g., https://overseerr.example.com)

settings.name: Overseerr API Key
settings.description: API key from Overseerr Settings > General
